purpose: Use Ink as the playable branching fiction surface while preserving Ghostlight state, projection, and consequence rationale as reviewed training data.

local_awareness_summary.text: Maer knows the clinic is nearly full, the packet may be testimony or noise, and rescue becomes theater if no one prepares intake.
Maer believes Sella will not hide behind false capacity, but asking her for help may be necessary and unfair.
Sella treats care as beds, food, air, consent, repair, and ongoing work rather than sentimental intent.

frame_controls.text: Frame the scene as capacity negotiation under uncertainty, not a morality duel with a clean answer.

authority_boundaries.text: Maer can ask, offer ledger backing, show or withhold the packet, and incur obligation; Sella controls sanctuary intake.

object_custody.text: The corrupted packet can be shown, withheld, or summarized, but it cannot be treated as clean proof.

required_semantics.text: Care must remain logistics and obligation, not just compassion.

forbidden_resolutions.text: Do not resolve whether the packet contains a person.
Do not make Sella accept without cost, condition, or resentment risk.

state_basis: Maer believes Sella will not hide behind false capacity.
Sella's care model responds to material support better than moral pressure.
reviewed_consequences: One monitored bay is conditionally reserved.
Sella's active trust and obligation toward Maer rise slightly under manual review.

state_basis: Maer recognizes that the ask is unfair.
Sella respects useful work more than symbolic care.
reviewed_consequences: Sella allows bounded help while defending triage authority.
Trust may rise if Maer respects red-list boundaries.

state_basis: The packet may be testimony or noise.
Sella suspects personhood but cannot prove it.
reviewed_consequences: Isolation protocol pressure rises before bay commitment.

state_basis: Maer's grievance activation and suspicion are elevated.
The packet's possible personhood makes pure capacity accounting feel morally obscene to Maer.
reviewed_consequences: Sella rejects moral pressure as a substitute for capacity.
Sella's active trust in Maer drops under manual review.

automated: Ink variables may record local branch outcomes for playthrough state.
Compiled Ink JSON can be consumed by runtime tools.
manual_review_required: Promotion from branch outcome into canonical Aetheria lore

review_notes: Ink owns branching structure; Ghostlight owns state rationale and consequence annotation.
Branches include speech, gesture, and object revelation.
The scene preserves future hooks for economic/resource behavior without implementing an economy loop.
